title: viola palmata var. triloba
intro: Viola palmata var. triloba, also known as the Three-lobed Violet, is a perennial plant in the viola family that grows in the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Viola palmata var. triloba include its ability to reduce stress, improve mood, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia and anxiety. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and creams, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory issues.
